sub_goals.description: src/leaderboards.js — view with Weekly/Monthly/All-Time tabs + Firestore listeners on /leaderboards/{scale}
Client-mode mirror: when serverEngineMode==='client-dealer', recompute is invoked from the local client on tournament-finish/admin-recompute (parallels recomputeLeaderboards Cloud Function)

verification_summary: S7.A1-A4 verified. Three tabs render; rows show nickname/picture/score; aggregate equals sum of PWCS scores in window per the formula.
